_comment: Per-type PROTECTION COUNT floor (monotonic, raise-only). Normal PRs that ADD protection must NOT edit this file: adding protection only raises the CURRENT count, which passes current>=floor untouched. Bump it ONLY via `tools/check_ac_index.py --update-floor` (a separate lock-in-gains action), so it is almost never in a PR diff and does not become a conflict hotspot. Default all-zero is valid.
